name: General
description: General discussions and announcements for our community. Share news, updates, and anything that doesn't fit into other categories.

name: Age of Empires
description: Discuss strategies, share replays, and connect with fellow Age of Empires players. From AoE II to AoE IV, all titles welcome!

name: Programming
description: A space for developers to share knowledge, ask questions, and discuss programming languages, frameworks, and best practices.

name: Book Club
description: Share book recommendations, reviews, and discuss your favorite reads. From fiction to non-fiction, all genres are welcome.
